title: Reading the Signs
description: A mix result narrows things down, but not all the way. Which aspect should you protect?

hints.text: The B+ mix result tells you that both ingredients share the same Blue sign, but with different sizes. Combined with G+, how many alchemicals remain for ingredient 1?
Ingredient 1 must have G+ and be part of a pair that produces B+. That narrows it to nPp and PPP — both have G+ and B+, but they disagree on Red.
Hedge Red. The mixing result and aspect clue together confirm G and B, but leave Red ambiguous — a debunker targeting Red could still catch you out.
